name: atomicmemory
description: AtomicMemory memory layer for Codex. Pluggable semantic memory — swap backends through the SDK's MemoryProvider model by config, not code change.

interface.shortDescription: Pluggable semantic memory for AI coding workflows
interface.longDescription: AtomicMemory adds durable, scope-aware semantic memory to Codex. Store decisions, user preferences, project context, and deterministic session snapshots across conversations — retrievable via semantic search. Backend-agnostic: self-hosted AtomicMemory core (Apache-2.0, Docker Compose) out of the box, with the SDK's MemoryProvider model for alternative backends.
defaultPrompt: Search my memories for recent project decisions
Remember that we always use pnpm in this repo
Save a handoff snapshot for this task
What do you know about my coding conventions?
